prestazioni: Engine: 2.2L inline-5 *KKK-K26 turbocharged (engine code: WU/MC) with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a fully balanced crankshaft for 1.2 bar boost levels. Upgraded Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump paired with Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors and a custom AEM F/IC standalone ECU for precise fuel mapping.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT3071R .63 A/R with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (T3/T4 flange) and a GReddy Type-S blow-off valve to prevent compressor surge. Upgraded intercooler: custom front-mount Spearco IC-77 with 2.5-inch aluminum piping and silicone couplings from Vibrant Performance.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) in a reinforced 016 transmission with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) and lightweight flywheel. Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with adjustable camber plates and polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (black series) for the front control arms and subframe.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody kit from Prior Design (PD800R) with custom front splitter, side skirts, and a ducktail rear spoiler. Rear diffuser: custom 3D-printed ABS unit with integrated twin 3.5-inch exhaust outlets (stainless steel, mandrel-bent).

Wheels: BBS RS-GT 17x9 ET20 (front) and 17x10 ET25 (rear) with 225/45/17 and 255/40/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. Wheel spacers: H&R 15mm hubcentric spacers (5x112) with extended wheel bolts from Bimecc.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E carbon fiber bucket seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage: TIG-welded 4130 chromoly cage from Custom Cages UK with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Steering wheel: Momo Prototipo 330mm with quick-release hub and NRG solid billet adapters.
